arts.ttl: Chelsea 'attempted to hijack Tottenham deadline day deal' while player was 'waiting at the airport'
arts.sum: In the final hour on deadline day, Spurs announced that they had sealed a short-term loan for Tel - with an option to buy in the summer for £46million on a six-year deal.

arts.ttl: Tottenham signing Mason Melia 'playing catch-up' as Damien Duff sounds cautionary note
arts.sum: Damien Duff has wished Mason Melia well with his record-breaking switch to Tottenham - but fears the teenager will be playing catch-up. “It's the Catch 22 of this (Brexit) rule going away to England - he has stayed here and got first-team exposure and we have kept the best players here.
Micky got through the game alright but I don’t think he feels ready for that step up to the Premier League, the intensity of it. Kevin (Danso) and Mathys (Tel) are both available.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Tottenham Have Already Decided not to Sign Forward on Permanent Deal
arts.sum: Tottenham have been exciting in attack this season but one star would leave after an underwhelming campaign

arts.ttl: How Liverpool Have Improved Their Injury Record in the 2024/25 Season
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold is Liverpool's only first-team injury as things stand - which is a big change of fortunes from the last few years.
